title: Uruguayan Mellow Steak
description: A keto recipe featuring a delicious Uruguayan steak seasoned with mellow and peppery flavors.

ingredients.name: Mellow seasoning
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of oregano, thyme, and basil

instructions: Season the steak with mellow and peppery seasoning.
Brush the steak with olive oil.
Heat a skillet over high heat and sear the steak for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 10-12 minutes or until the steak reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the steak from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with bake seasoning sprinkled on top.
If using ikura, garnish with it on top of the steak.
